## Quanta Services Q2 2026 Earnings Preview Flags Power Infrastructure Outlook

Quanta Services is a direct contractor beneficiary of AI-driven power infrastructure demand; its Q2 2026 results will serve as a real-time read on how datacenter and energy storage buildout is translating into revenue, making it a useful pacing indicator for the broader AI infrastructure spend cycle.

- One outlet published a Q2 2026 earnings preview for Quanta Services (PWR).
- Coverage is forward-looking; no actual results or guidance have been reported at the time of coverage.
- PWR is tagged to datacenter buildout pacing and energy storage buildout, reflecting its power infrastructure exposure.
- High classifier confidence; the earnings preview is directly material to the PWR financial narrative.
